mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_usage WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_chemical_usage WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_usage WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_usage WHERE deleted = 0
AND (chemical_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR department LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR handler LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_chemical_usage WHERE deleted = 0
AND (chemical_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR department LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR handler LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_chemical_usage ( usage_date, chemical_name, department, purpose, usage_quantity, unit, handler, remaining_stock, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{usageDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{chemicalName}, #{department}, #{purpose}, #{usageQuantity}, #{unit}, #{handler}, #{remainingStock}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_chemical_usage SET usage_date = #{usageDate,jdbcType=DATE}, chemical_name = #{chemicalName}, department = #{department}, purpose = #{purpose}, usage_quantity = #{usageQuantity}, unit = #{unit}, handler = #{handler}, remaining_stock = #{remainingStock}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_chemical_usage SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
